TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Kalahaay, title = Kalahaay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kalahaay} }

S.FORM: = Kalahaay = Gaga mniq Taytung Cngkungcn ka alang Kalahaay. 738 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 2,154 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 15% niqan 316 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 85% niqan 1,838 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis13%, Paiwan0.4%, Puyuma0.4%, ni rahuq na o0.5%.
S.PHON: = kalaħaaj = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦŋkuŋʦn ka alaŋ kalaħaaj. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, paiwan*.*%, pujuma*.*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*.*%.
S.FORM: = Kalahaay = Gaga mniq Taytung Cngkungcn ka alang Kalahaay. 738 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 2,154 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 15% niqan 316 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 85% niqan 1,838 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis13%, Paiwan0.4%, Puyuma0.4%, ni rahuq na o0.5%.
S.PHON: = kalaħaaj = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦŋkuŋʦn ka alaŋ kalaħaaj. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, paiwan*.*%, pujuma*.*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*.*%.
